en.subTitle: Complete with Family Deductions for Salary Tax
en.childrenHint: *Each child gives 150,000 KHR deduction per month
en.otherHint: *Each dependent gives 150,000 KHR deduction per month
en.rentalHint: *Taxed at progressive rates with 20% business deduction. Official: Prakas No. 576
en.transportationHint: *Simplified estimate. Official rates vary by vehicle type. Official: Prakas No. 738
